# Inviscid Supersonic Wedge

This notebook provides a Python approach to setup and run the standard tutorial case [Inviscid Supersonic Wedge](https://su2code.github.io/tutorials/Inviscid_Wedge/) and reading that case before getting here is highly recommended, since we will not be discussing all the points.

```{python}
%load_ext autoreload
%autoreload 2
```

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

majpath = Path("../../../python-majordome/src").resolve()
sys.path.insert(0, str(majpath))

import majordome
print(f"Using majordome version: {majordome.__file__}")
```

```{python}
from majordome._majordome import su2
from majordome.su2.mesh import *
from majordome.su2.enums import *
from majordome.su2.groups import *
import pyvista as pv

pv.set_jupyter_backend("static")
```

## Handling CGNS mesh files

Currently neighter `gmsh` or `meshio` provide a working CGNS to SU2 conversion that is reliable enough for production use. Since SU2 itself provides a converter we can use it as a workaround to read CGNS files. The trick is to generate a dummy SU2 config file and call SU2 to perform the conversion.

```{python}
fpath = "mesh.cgns"
mesh_file = Path(fpath).with_suffix(".su2")

if mesh_file.exists():
    print("SU2 mesh file already exists, skipping conversion.")
elif not su2_def_mesh_conversion(fpath):
    print("Mesh conversion failed!")

mesh_reader = SU2MeshLoader("mesh.su2")
mesh = mesh_reader.to_pyvista()
mesh.outline()
```

```{python}
mesh_reader.boundaries
```

## Prepare case file

```{python}
conf = SU2Configuration()

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------- DIRECT, ADJOINT, AND LINEARIZED PROBLEM DEFINITION ------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.problem = ProblemDefinition(
    solver       = SU2.SolverType.Euler,
    math_problem = MathProblem.DIRECT,
    restart_sol  = YesNoEnum.NO,
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------------------------- SOLVER CONTROL ------------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.solver_control = SolverControl(
    iter                 = 10_000,
    conv_field           = "RMS_DENSITY",
    conv_residual_minval = -13,
    conv_startiter       = 10,
    conv_cauchy_elems    = 100,
    conv_cauchy_eps      = 1.0e-10,
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# -------------------- COMPRESSIBLE FREE-STREAM DEFINITION --------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.compressible_freestream = CompressibleFreeStreamDefinition(
    mach             = 2.0,
    angle_of_attack  = 0.0,
    sideslip_angle   = 0.0,
    pressure         = 100_000.0,
    temperature      = 300.0
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ---------------------- REFERENCE VALUE DEFINITION ---------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.reference_values = ReferenceValues(
    ref_origin_moment_x = 0.25,
    ref_origin_moment_y = 0.00,
    ref_origin_moment_z = 0.00,
    ref_length          = 1.0,
    ref_area            = 1.0
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# -------------------- BOUNDARY CONDITION DEFINITION --------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

T_inlet = 300.0
P_inlet = 100000.0
U_inlet = (695.4290761824674, 0.0, 0.0)
inlet = BCTypeSupersonicInlet("inlet", T_inlet, P_inlet, U_inlet)

P_outlet = 101300.0
outlet = ["outlet", P_outlet]

conf.boundary_conditions = BoundaryConditions(
    marker_euler  = [
        BCTypeWallEuler("upper"),
        BCTypeWallEuler("lower"),
    ],
    marker_supersonic_inlet  = inlet,
    marker_outlet = outlet,
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------------------- SURFACES IDENTIFICATION ---------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.surfaces_identification = SurfacesIdentification(
    marker_plotting   = ["lower"],
    marker_monitoring = ["upper", "lower"],
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------- COMMON PARAMETERS DEFINING THE NUMERICAL METHOD ---------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.common_numerical_parameters = CommonParametersNumerical(
    num_method_grad = NumMethodGrad.WEIGHTED_LEAST_SQUARES,
    cfl_number      = 5.0,
    cfl_adapt       = YesNoEnum.NO,
    cfl_adapt_param = ParametersCFL(
        factor_down            = 0.1,
        factor_up              = 2.0,
        min_value              = 50.0,
        max_value              = 1.0e+10
    ),
    rk_alpha_coeff = (0.66667, 0.66667, 1.000000),
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------- SLOPE LIMITER AND DISSIPATION SENSOR DEFINITION ---------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.slope_limiter = SlopeLimiter(
    muscl_flow           = YesNoEnum.YES,
    slope_limiter_flow   = SlopeLimiterType.NONE,
    venkat_limiter_coeff = 0.006,
    jst_sensor_coeff     = (0.5, 0.02)
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------------------- LINEAR SOLVER DEFINITION --------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.linear_solver_parameters = LinearSolverParameters(
    linear_solver      = LinearSolver.FGMRES,
    linear_solver_prec = Preconditioner.ILU,
    error              = 1.0e-06,
    n_iter             = 20
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# -------------------------- MULTIGRID PARAMETERS -----------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.multigrid_parameters = MultigridParameters(
    mg_level             = 3,
    mg_cycle             = MgCycle.W_CYCLE,
    mg_pre_smooth        = [1, 2, 3, 3],
    mg_post_smooth       = [0, 0, 0, 0],
    mg_correction_smooth = [0, 0, 0, 0],
    mg_damp_restriction  = 1.0,
    mg_damp_prolongation = 1.0
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# -------------------- FLOW NUMERICAL METHOD DEFINITION -----------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.flow_numerical_method = FlowNumericalMethod(
    conv_num_method_flow = ConvectiveScheme.HLLC,
    time_discre_flow     = TimeDiscretization.EULER_IMPLICIT,
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ----------------------- SCREEN/HISTORY VOLUME OUTPUT ------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.screen_history_info = ScreenHistoryInfo(
    screen_output = [
        "INNER_ITER",
        "WALL_TIME",
        "RMS_DENSITY",
        "RMS_ENERGY",
        "LIFT",
        "DRAG"
    ],
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ----------------------- INPUT/OUTPUT FILE INFORMATION -----------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

conf.io_file_info = IOFileInfo(
    mesh_filename         = "mesh.su2",
    mesh_format           = MeshFormat.SU2,
    mesh_out_filename     = "sol_mesh.su2",
    solution_filename     = "sol_flow",
    solution_adj_filename = "sol_adj",
    tabular_format        = TabularFormat.CSV,
    conv_filename         = "sol_history.dat",
    restart_filename      = "sol_restart_flow",
    restart_adj_filename  = "sol_restart_adj",
    volume_filename       = "sol_volume_flow",
    volume_adj_filename   = "sol_volume_adj",
    grad_objfunc_filename = "sol_of_grad.dat",
    surface_filename      = "sol_surface_flow",
    surface_adj_filename  = "sol_surface_adj",
)

#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# ------------------------ DESIGN VARIABLE PARAMETERS -------------------------%
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

print(conf.to_cfg())
# conf.to_file("model.cfg", force=True)
```

```{python}
T_inlet = 300.0
P_inlet = 100000.0
U_inlet = SU2.VelocityType(695.4290761824674, 0.0, 0.0)
inlet = SU2.InletType.SupersonicInlet("inlet", T_inlet, P_inlet, U_inlet)
print(inlet.to_input())
```
